name: battle-test
description: battle-test — A Claude Code skill that runs a council of personas over any artifact before you commit to it.

plugins.name: battle-test
plugins.description: A Claude Code skill that runs a council of personas (target audience, domain practitioner, AI-security researcher, instructional designer, copywriter, policy/risk reviewer, audience skeptic, future-self, contrarian) over any artifact in parallel, files findings tagged Critical / Material / Polish, and computes a deterministic Ship / One More Round / Structural Rework verdict. Emits markdown log + self-contained HTML report.
